source: We need to fix the authentication middleware without changing the API contract. Keep the current error message exactly the same. The likely bug is that token expiry uses < instead of <=. Update tests around the boundary case and do not introduce a database migration.

Current status: parser change is implemented in src/parser.ts, but integration tests are not run yet. Unit tests pass. The main unresolved issue is whether the new delimiter handling breaks legacy CSV imports. Next steps are to run integration tests and verify one old fixture before merging.

This repository uses Bun for scripts, not npm. Prefer ripgrep for search. Avoid destructive git commands unless explicitly requested. If editing frontend code, preserve the existing design system and do not introduce a new font stack.

Refactor the payments client to isolate retry logic into a single helper. Do not change request payload shapes or public method names. Add unit coverage for timeout and 429 retry behavior. Risk: webhook reconciliation may depend on existing error wrapping.
Auth fix is in src/auth.ts. Keep API stable. Keep the exact error text. Tests for the boundary case still need to be added. No DB migration.

Findings: src/cache.ts may leak stale entries after partial invalidation. Keep the external API unchanged. Add a regression test for concurrent invalidation. Risk: metrics dashboards currently rely on the old miss counter shape.

Fix parser regression in src/parser.ts. Do not change CSV output shape. Preserve exact error string "invalid delimiter". Add edge-case test for trailing separators. Risk: legacy import fixtures may rely on previous whitespace trimming.

Deploy uses Bun scripts and `bun run build`. Keep environment variable names exactly the same. Do not change the health check path `/healthz`. Verify staging before production deploy. Risk: older workers still expect `API_BASE_URL`.

Current status: refresh flow patch is in src/auth/refresh.ts. Repro still exists on iOS clients only. Unit tests pass; integration tests not run yet. Do not change the token response shape. Next steps: capture one failing fixture, run integration tests, then compare expiry math.

Webhook reconciliation retry requires webhook reconciliation backoff because webhook reconciliation failures can trigger webhook reconciliation loops. Preserve webhook reconciliation error text exactly. Add webhook reconciliation tests after webhook reconciliation middleware changes.

Update the dashboard layout in src/ui/dashboard.tsx. Preserve the existing design system. Do not introduce a new font stack. Keep keyboard navigation behavior unchanged. Add a smoke test for the compact sidebar state.

Implement the new audit log batching helper in src/audit/batch.ts. Do not change request payload shapes, response fields, or public method names. Keep the current 429 error message unchanged. Add tests for flush-on-exit and partial batch failure.

Current status: search ranking patch is implemented in src/search/rank.ts, but integration tests are not run yet. Unit tests pass. Keep the API contract unchanged. Risk: older ranking fixtures may break if score normalization shifts. Next steps: run integration tests, verify one old fixture, then merge if green.

Use Bun for scripts, not npm. Prefer rg for search. Avoid destructive git commands unless explicitly requested. Preserve the existing API response shape in backend refactors. Check src/api/server.ts before changing route wiring.

Deploy uses `bun run build` and Bun scripts. Keep environment variable names exactly the same. Do not change the health check path `/healthz`. Verify staging before production deploy. Risk: legacy workers still expect `WORKER_API_BASE_URL`.

Update navigation layout in src/ui/nav.tsx. Preserve the existing design system. Do not introduce a new font stack. Keep keyboard navigation behavior unchanged. Add a smoke test for the compact mobile drawer state.

Findings: src/auth/cache.ts may retain stale session entries after partial invalidation. Keep the external API unchanged. Add a regression test for concurrent invalidation. Risk: admin dashboards currently rely on the old cache-miss metric shape.

Current status: CSV parser patch is in src/parser/csv.ts. Repro still exists on one legacy fixture only. Unit tests pass; integration tests not run yet. Do not change CSV output shape. Next steps: capture the failing fixture, run integration tests, then compare delimiter normalization.

Implement the GraphQL batching helper in src/graphql/batch.ts. Do not change request payload shapes, response fields, or public method names. Keep the current error message unchanged. Add tests for partial batch failure and timeout retry behavior.
